titleStmt.title: SII 6.922: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 922. (A.R. No. 296-K of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śākēbdē biṁduyugmānalaśaśigaṇitē māsi vaiśākhasaṁjñē kṛṣṇaikādaśyu
pētē ravitanayadinē siṁhaś£ailēśvarasya . satbhattyā dīpadaṁḍaṁ jalaghaṭamamalaṁ
vījanaṁ cātapatraṁ puṇyāpyai vuṣpamālāṁ pratidinamadadānmādisēnādhinā
thaḥ . śrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1300 gunēṁṭi vaiśakha bahaḷa Ēkādaśiyu
saurivāramunāṁḍu cellēśvaramahasēnāpati koḍuku mādhavamahāsēnā
vati tanaku Abhīṣṭhā¨rtthasiddhigā śrīnarasiṁhanāthuni śrībhaṁḍāramaṁduṁ badmani
dhi gaṁḍamāḍalu 25 peṭṭiThe letterAi is denoted by E with the ¤ symbol below it.Aidu kuṁcālu prasādamu vṛttigāṁ baḍaśi kaṁci bha
ṭlu koḍuku varadayyaku goḍavu nibaṁdhamu dēvunāyakolupu divyakōla śrīgōpu ko
kuku Appiḷaku Ālavaṭṭamu nibaṁdhamu varadunāyaka gōpu jalakamu nibaṁdha
mu nityamunnu Oka [Ātupāśi ti]rumāla kōmaṭi lakumaḍu
dupaAvasaramaṁdu peṭṭagālāḍu Ī Ēgu(va)runnu Avamu
viḍiyamu jītamu Inini nibaṁdhasamasya Aṁdacellagala
du Ī dha¨rmmu śrīvaiṣṇama rakṣa śrīpureyināyuni koḍuku maṁkayacē
tanu reṁḍu māḍalaku reṁḍu gaṭlu koni Icci kumanikiṁ beṭṭenu I ko
nayyanāyunivāri dakṣaṇa ciṁgunāyunivāri Uttaraṁ taṁbhagarayavṛti
nu śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 6.922 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
